title: Full fee reimbursement for BC/SC/ST/minority students
target_beneficiaries: All BC/SC/ST/minority students in professional colleges
summary: Significant backlog from BRS era remains unpaid; fresh academic year disbursements also delayed; students protesting across Telangana. Government cited a legacy debt of over ₹3,000 crore from previous administration and launched a portal for fresh applications, but disbursements remain well below requirement.

sources.label: Fee reimbursement backlog from BRS era — The Hindu
Students protest fee reimbursement delay — Deccan Chronicle
2024-25 fee reimbursement yet to be credited — Telangana Today
